title: Jeevan Yudha
desc: Rohit desperately seeks his father's killer. Clues lead him to his home town where he finds a new police inspector, Ajay, in charge. He soon realises Ajay is none other than Deva, his father's killer.

title: Abhagini
desc: After enduring cruelty from her stepmother, Abhagini finds acceptance and love in a new family, overcoming prejudice and forging a fresh path.

title: Tomai Pabo Bole
desc: Two feuding families can't stand each other, but everything changes when their son and daughter unexpectedly fall in love, sparking a whirlwind of drama and surprises.

title: Amar Sapath
desc: A boy whose parents were killed and his sister kidnapped by a ruthless criminal embarks on a quest for revenge and to reunite with his lost sister.

title: Debar
desc: In a middle-class family, the eldest brother sacrifices his life while trying to provide the best education for his younger brother, putting him in charge of all familial decisions.

title: Big Boss
desc: A young man turns into a crime lord after a dirty conspiracy almost destroys his life, setting up a series of dangerous events to follow.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!

title: Eso Maa Lakshmi
desc: Devotees celebrate Goddess Lakshmi with prayers, rituals and heartfelt devotion, seeking prosperity, blessings and harmony in their homes and lives.

title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Anjali
desc: Bhawani, a religious man, plans to get his daughter, Anita, married to Biswajit. However, she loves Dipak, who wants to marry her for her wealth.

title: Churiwala
desc: A Bangladeshi romance starring Ferdous Ahmed, this film follows a love story that confronts societal pressures and family opposition, highlighting courage, sacrifice, and resilience.

title: Baba Keno Chakar
desc: Story of a father whose son left him in agony. The son not only refused to stand by his father, but also made him a slave in his own family.

title: Abhimanyu
desc: Raj Sinha, a cop, kills Durjo Rai's son in an encounter. Filled with rage, Durjo kills Sinha's family. Sinha then enlists the help of a suspended cop.

title: Debibaran
desc: Satyapriyo, an editor, seeks justice for his sister Swati after she is raped, challenging a corrupt village officer in a gripping tale of courage and determination.

title: Chaoya Paoya
desc: A simple man's life transforms when he stands against injustice, becoming a symbol of hope for the oppressed.

title: Bhagya Debata
desc: Jagdish witnesses a murder and feeling guilty for not saving the victim, he becomes a vigilante named Alfred to fight crime and bring justice to his city.

title: Police Officer
desc: Star Cast: Mammootty, Manju Benjamin, Sai Kumar, Vijayaraghavan, Shammi Thilakan, Rajan P Dev, Mohan Jose and others. Director: Renji Panicker

title: Tumi Je Amar
desc: Arun and Sujata raise their two sons, Rahul and Suman, separately. But their lives get intertwined later on when the sons get married.

title: Mahajan
desc: A powerful landowner conducts his business and lives his life with cruelty. However, various circumstances influence him to change his nature and tactics over time.

title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
desc: In this poignant tale, Rupa navigates societal beauty standards and love, as her husband struggles to accept her disfigurement, unaware that both faces belong to her.
